examples: So, the problem with astrological predictions is not that they're wrong.
Following their discovery they found their way into astrological predictions.
Some people have a special interest or belief in their astrological information.
In his own study, Dr Austin tested 24 hypotheses, two for each astrological sign.
The marvels keep coming, from astrological and medical texts to a richly embellished 18th-century Damascus reception room.
